essence: Crafts coffee and provides friendly customer service in fast-paced environments.

identity.title: Barista
identity.summary: Prepares coffee and beverages, operates equipment, and delivers excellent customer service.

salary.notes: Specialist baristas and supervisors can earn more, especially in artisan cafés.

lifestyle.description: Baristas work in cafés and coffee shops, preparing drinks, serving customers, and maintaining equipment. The role suits friendly, energetic people who enjoy fast-paced service work.
